name: GigBAR MOVE + ILS
comment: Par 1 and Par 2 have independent control in 52-channel mode. Moving heads (Spot 1 & Spot 2) share channels in 30-channel mode. This is the EU version (GIGBARMOVE+ILS, item code 10051948).
